items.signal_summary: RFP for digital marketing firms to support undergraduate enrollment campaign objectives.
items.fit_notes: Higher-ed marketing, campaign strategy, creative, content, digital ads, and student recruitment align with ninety two.
items.recommended_action: Pull full RFP immediately and pursue directly unless media-buying requirements are heavy.
items.raw_text: SUNY Morrisville Marketing Services 2026 opportunity. Digital marketing support for undergraduate enrollment. Deadline July 7, 2026. Contact listed in source summary: John Gunerman.

items.opportunity_title: Canal Basin Park / Waterfront Gateway Creative Support
items.signal_summary: NY Forward-funded public realm design opportunity with potential for environmental graphics, signage, stakeholder visuals, and placemaking support.
items.fit_notes: Not pure brand/web, but strong partner angle for signage, wayfinding, presentation design, public-facing graphics, and placemaking.
items.recommended_action: Find engineering or landscape architecture bidders and offer creative/signage subcontract support.
items.raw_text: Village of Medina Canal Basin Park / Waterfront Gateway RFP. Funding includes NY Forward and ZEV infrastructure grant. Contact: Mayor Deborah L. Padoleski.
